name: x : I64 := 42
code:
use init

def x : I64 := 42

def main (args : List String) : I64 := x

name: add (x : I64) (y : I64)
code:
use init

use math

def add (x : I64) (y : I64) : I64 := x + y

def main (args : List String) : I64 := add 1 2

name: factorial
code:
use init

use math

def factorial (n : I64) : I64 :=
  if n == 0
  then 1
  else n * factorial (n - 1)

def main (args : List String) : I64 := factorial 5
